selectChannelDesc: Turn on the TV and choose a channel to start enjoying the CD Dramas.
footerText:
Unofficial Adachi to Shimamura fan site.
Created by fans, non-profit.
Adachi to Shimamura and all rights belong to Hitoma Iruma.

channels.label: CH 1
channels.title: CD DRAMA — 2nd YEAR
channels.desc: Enjoy this audio story that expands the character interactions during their second year, with the original cast voices.

channels.label: CH 2
channels.title: SHIMAMURA SWORD
channels.desc: The most awkward moment in history. Listen to the iconic "Shimamura Sword".

channels.label: CH 3
channels.title: CD DRAMA — VOLUME 13
channels.desc: Exclusive audio content accompanying Volume 13 of the light novels. An unmissable moment in the story of Adachi and Shimamura.
